subcodes.first_line: All praise be to God! Through the loving-kindness of the All-Merciful, thou hast attained unto the fragrance of the flowers of the true Rose-garden. God willing, thou must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت رحمانی بعرف اوراد گلستان حقیقی فائز شدید انشاء الله باید
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Greatest Name, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
